text.content: MAXAM Tire Unveils Revolutionary MS453PRO at MINEXPO 2024

rich_text.plain_text: MAXAM Tire Unveils Revolutionary MS453PRO at MINEXPO 2024

text.content: Showcasing Innovation and Durability in Mining Tires at Booth #10721 in the West Hall

rich_text.plain_text: Showcasing Innovation and Durability in Mining Tires at Booth #10721 in the West Hall

text.content: [Danvers, Massachusetts, Aug 28th, 2024]

rich_text.plain_text: [Danvers, Massachusetts, Aug 28th, 2024]

text.content:
– MAXAM Tire North America is set to showcase its latest advancements in mining tire technology at MINEXPO 2024, taking place in Las Vegas, NV, from September 24-26. Visitors to Booth #10721 in the West Hall will be among the first to experience the new MS453PRO haul truck tire and the new 3-star MS501 45/65R45 underground mining tire.

The MS453PRO represents a leap forward in mining tire technology with several key features:

rich_text.plain_text:
– MAXAM Tire North America is set to showcase its latest advancements in mining tire technology at MINEXPO 2024, taking place in Las Vegas, NV, from September 24-26. Visitors to Booth #10721 in the West Hall will be among the first to experience the new MS453PRO haul truck tire and the new 3-star MS501 45/65R45 underground mining tire.

The MS453PRO represents a leap forward in mining tire technology with several key features:

text.content: Improved Design

rich_text.plain_text: Improved Design

text.content: : The reduced lug groove length on the tread maximizes footprint and wear, ensuring longer-lasting performance.

rich_text.plain_text: : The reduced lug groove length on the tread maximizes footprint and wear, ensuring longer-lasting performance.

text.content: Enhanced Durability

rich_text.plain_text: Enhanced Durability

text.content: : The tire incorporates a unique shoulder tie bar design to increase tread life by reducing lug deflection and stabilizing tread shoulder.

rich_text.plain_text: : The tire incorporates a unique shoulder tie bar design to increase tread life by reducing lug deflection and stabilizing tread shoulder.

text.content: Innovative Self-Cleaning

rich_text.plain_text: Innovative Self-Cleaning

text.content: : The 2-stage groove design boosts the contact patch while offering an enhanced self-cleaning feature.

rich_text.plain_text: : The 2-stage groove design boosts the contact patch while offering an enhanced self-cleaning feature.

text.content: Higher TKPH

rich_text.plain_text: Higher TKPH

text.content: : The MS453PRO boasts a higher Ton-Kilometers Per Hour (TKPH) rating compared to its predecessor, providing superior efficiency in demanding mining operations.

rich_text.plain_text: : The MS453PRO boasts a higher Ton-Kilometers Per Hour (TKPH) rating compared to its predecessor, providing superior efficiency in demanding mining operations.

text.content: In addition to the MS453PRO, MAXAM Tire will debut the 3-star MS501 45/65R45 tire, designed to tackle the toughest off-road conditions. Key features include:

rich_text.plain_text: In addition to the MS453PRO, MAXAM Tire will debut the 3-star MS501 45/65R45 tire, designed to tackle the toughest off-road conditions. Key features include:

text.content: Specialized Compound

rich_text.plain_text: Specialized Compound

text.content: : Increased cut and impact resistance for extended tire life.

rich_text.plain_text: : Increased cut and impact resistance for extended tire life.

text.content: Deep L5 Offset Lug Pattern

rich_text.plain_text: Deep L5 Offset Lug Pattern

text.content: : Combines excellent traction with high resistance to wear, suitable for all off-road conditions.

rich_text.plain_text: : Combines excellent traction with high resistance to wear, suitable for all off-road conditions.

text.content: Improved Puncture Resistance

rich_text.plain_text: Improved Puncture Resistance

text.content: : A deep undertread and belt package to ensure better protection against punctures.

rich_text.plain_text: : A deep undertread and belt package to ensure better protection against punctures.

text.content: Reinforced Construction

rich_text.plain_text: Reinforced Construction

text.content: : The bead, shoulder, and sidewall are reinforced for increased cut resistance, ensuring durability in the harshest environments.

rich_text.plain_text: : The bead, shoulder, and sidewall are reinforced for increased cut resistance, ensuring durability in the harshest environments.

text.content:
“We are excited to present the MS453PRO and MS501 at MINEXPO 2024, demonstrating our commitment to innovation and excellence in the mining industry,” said Troy Kline, President of MAXAM Tire North America. “These new products not only extend tire life and performance but also exemplify MAXAM’s dedication to providing reliable solutions that enhance productivity for our customers.”

Visitors to the MAXAM Tire booth will have the opportunity to learn more about these new products and explore the full range of OTR solutions designed to meet the diverse needs of the mining industry.

For more information or to schedule an interview, please contact us at marketing@maxamtirena.com.
